_comment: Phase 6 — discipline anchor sentences. One short, prototypical sentence per discipline. Embedded at first use with text-embedding-3-small (1536-dim, cheap). Used as a fallback signal when the keyword tokens in disciplines.json miss a job title (e.g. a job named 'Software Specialist II'). Add new disciplines here; keep wording crisp and generic.

anchors.frontend: Frontend web engineer building React, Angular, or Vue user interfaces with HTML, CSS, TypeScript.
anchors.backend: Backend server engineer building REST and gRPC APIs, microservices, databases, and distributed systems.
anchors.fullstack: Fullstack engineer building both frontend UI and backend APIs with end-to-end ownership.
anchors.mobile: Mobile engineer building Android (Kotlin) or iOS (Swift) apps, including React Native and Flutter.
anchors.ml: Machine learning engineer building model training, inference, MLOps pipelines with PyTorch or TensorFlow.
anchors.data: Data engineer building ETL pipelines, data warehousing, analytics with Airflow, Spark, dbt, Snowflake.
anchors.devops: DevOps and SRE engineer building CI/CD, Kubernetes, Terraform, observability, and reliability.
anchors.security: Security engineer doing application security, penetration testing, threat modeling, OWASP.
anchors.qa: QA / SDET test automation engineer writing test frameworks and CI test pipelines.
anchors.embedded: Embedded firmware engineer working on FPGA, RTOS, microcontrollers, hardware bring-up.
anchors.robotics: Robotics engineer working on perception, motion planning, actuation, and ROS.
anchors.network: Network or wireless engineer building 5G, RF, WiFi, telecom infrastructure.
anchors.voice: Voice and speech engineer working on ASR, TTS, voice assistants like Alexa.
anchors.game: Gameplay or game engine engineer working on Unity, Unreal, real-time graphics.
anchors.manager: Engineering manager or director leading software teams, hiring, and roadmap.
anchors.product: Product manager owning roadmap, requirements, user research, and cross-functional delivery.
anchors.design: UX or UI designer building wireframes, prototypes, and design systems in Figma.
anchors.sales: Sales, account executive, customer success, or solutions architect closing and supporting customers.
anchors.finance: Finance, investment banking, equity research, FP&A, financial modeling, valuation analyst.
anchors.hr: HR, recruiting, talent acquisition, people operations, HR business partner.
anchors.legal: Legal counsel, attorney, paralegal, compliance officer.
anchors.operations: Operations manager, business operations, supply chain, logistics, fulfillment.
anchors.accounting: Accountant, controller, auditor, tax analyst, internal audit, bookkeeper.
anchors.marketing: Marketing manager, brand manager, growth marketing, SEO, content marketing.
anchors.support: Customer support, technical support engineer, help desk, service desk.
